summary: Verified auth, role-based dashboards, health/demo fallbacks, protected endpoints, and certificate PDF generation. All 4 seeded roles (admin/coach/student/parent) log in and land on role-specific dashboards with correct sidebars. Anonymous access is blocked (401) and role restrictions return 403. Health endpoint correctly reports database_mode=sqlite-demo, summary_mode=local-demo, storage_mode=local-demo. Certificate generate + PDF download returns real application/pdf (2891 bytes, %PDF magic). Parent-summary local fallback works. Parent and Student dashboards correctly hide management submit buttons. CRITICAL BLOCKER: seeded activities reference coach_id=2 but the actual seeded coach user (Jordan Lee / coach@talentdemo.com) has id=6 — so coach & student dashboards show 0 activities, 0 roster members, 0 materials, and every coach mutation endpoint (materials, assessments, events, certificates, parent-summary) is rejected with 404 'Activity not visible to this coach'. Same orphaning affects student enrollments (Enrolled tracks 0, Practice hours 0). Root cause is almost certainly the seed_demo_data() idempotency check leaving stale rows created before the .local -> .talentdemo email fix.
passed: GET /api/health returns 200 with correct demo-mode flags
GET /api/dashboard returns 200 for all 4 roles with role-specific keys
Login page renders, all four role dashboards render with role-specific dynamic sidebars
Student dashboard hides coach/admin management submit buttons

failed.issue: Activities are assigned coach_id=2, but the current seeded coach user has id=6. Coach's visible activities/roster/materials are empty, breaking all coach flows (materials, assessments, events, certificates, parent-summary) end-to-end from the UI.
failed.evidence: GET /api/activities as admin returns activities with coach_id=2 (Basketball Elite Squad, Choir Performance Lab, Guitar Technique Studio). GET /api/auth/me for coach returns id=6. Coach dashboard shows Assigned squads=0, Roster members=0. POST /api/materials/assessments/events/certificates/ai/parent-summary as coach with a real activity_id all fail with 404 'Activity not visible to this coach'.

failed.issue: Student (id=7) is not enrolled in any activity; Student dashboard shows Enrolled tracks=0 and no materials, so 'assigned practice materials' and practice-log submission cannot be exercised against a real assigned activity via the UI.
failed.evidence: GET /api/activities as student returns []. GET /api/dashboard as student shows activities=[], materials count=0, enrolled tracks card=0.

action_items: Fix seed_demo_data() idempotency: either wipe /app/backend/*.sqlite (or whichever demo DB file) and re-run seeding, or update the seed to re-point Activity.coach_id and Enrollment.student_id to the currently-seeded users (admin/coach/student/parent) when they already exist. After the fix, coach must see roster > 0 and student must see enrolled_tracks > 0.

Re-run coach and student end-to-end flows (material upload/YouTube publish, assessment, event, certificate, parent-summary, practice log submission) after seed fix — none of these could be validated as the coach/student role due to the seed mismatch.
Consider exposing a POST /api/logout button with data-testid="logout-button" (current UI uses text 'Sign out' with no test id, minor).
